description: Lock Itineraries & Route Guides to source-backed written route and sailing guides, not public archival repositories or formal surveyed maps.

checks.reason: The launch-quality date is anchored to the mid-first-century CE Periplus Maris Erythraei rather than the old Classical era-default placeholder.
Road networks enable written road itineraries, but the node also includes maritime periploi.
Maritime periploi list sailing routes, anchorages, hazards, and sailing seasons.
Archives can preserve route-guide texts but are not a prerequisite for writing or using route guides.
Formal surveyed maps are a distinct cartographic technology and must not become a prerequisite for written route guides.
